title: Add TUI startup sync, periodic background sync, and manual refresh keybinding

comments.author: maxine--plan-050
comments.content: Covers REQ-3, AC-7 through AC-9. Three parts: (1) startup sync before App::new() (~30 lines), (2) periodic 30s background sync using mpsc channel pattern from agents_tab.rs (~80 lines), (3) global 'r' keybinding for manual sync+refresh (~20 lines). No tab currently uses bare 'r'. SyncManager can run on background thread safely since hub cache worktree is separate from working tree.

comments.author: maxine--tui-startup-sync
comments.content: Plan: Three sync features for the TUI (REQ-3, AC-7/AC-8/AC-9): (1) Startup sync in run() before App::new() — SyncManager::fetch() + hydrate_to_sqlite() with 'Syncing...' message before alternate screen. (2) Periodic 30s background sync via mpsc channel (same pattern as agents_tab). (3) Global 'r' keybinding intercepted before tab dispatch triggers full sync. Per-tab 'r' handlers delegate to global. ':r' command palette remains as local disk refresh. Key files: tui/mod.rs (main), plus all 5 tab files.

comments.author: maxine--tui-startup-sync
comments.content: Decision: Made 'r' a global keybinding that triggers full sync (fetch + hydrate) rather than keeping per-tab local refresh. ':r' command palette remains as local-only disk refresh. Added force_refresh() to Tab trait so sync completion can reload data for eagerly-loaded tabs (IssuesTab, KnowledgeTab). Tabs with on_enter refresh (AgentsTab, ConfigTab, MilestonesTab) use default force_refresh (on_leave + on_enter).

comments.author: maxine--tui-startup-sync
comments.content: Decision: Background thread only does SyncManager::fetch() (network I/O). Hydration (hydrate_to_sqlite) runs on main thread to avoid SQLite threading issues. SyncResult struct carries cache_path and optional error across mpsc channel. PERIODIC_SYNC_INTERVAL = 30s defined as module-level constant for easy tuning.

comments.author: maxine--tui-startup-sync
comments.content: Result: Implemented all 3 sync features (AC-7, AC-8, AC-9). Startup sync: mod.rs:665-671, fetch+hydrate before alternate screen with 'Syncing...' message. Periodic sync: mod.rs:692-694, checks elapsed > 30s each loop tick, spawns background fetch. Manual refresh: mod.rs:213-215, global 'r' calls start_background_sync(). On sync completion poll_sync() hydrates DB and calls force_refresh() on active tab. 6 files changed, 151 insertions, 52 deletions. All 186 tests pass, clippy clean, fmt clean. Commit d60cfec on branch feature/add-tui-startup-sync-periodic-refresh-and-manual-r. Ready for push and PR.
